Off Calendar Jun-26-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Patrick N. Keegan, Esq. 619/232-0331 for pltf & opposing party; Ned N. Isokawa, Esq. 856-7003 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission. Each to submit proposed orders with two page letters by Monday (06/17). (Court announced amendment to its tentative ruling as follows: Order for class wide arbitration will only become effective after successful motion to this Court for class wide certification.) (AJR/KF(EX))
